title: gladiolus pretoriensis
intro: Gladiolus pretoriensis, also known as the Pretoria corn lily, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in South African folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Gladiolus pretoriensis include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. Herbal preparations of Gladiolus pretoriensis are often made by infusing the roots and rhizomes in hot water, which can be used as a medicinal tea or applied topically to affected areas.
